courses.signal: Expect weekly labs and one larger systems project. Pairing this with two other heavy technical courses increases risk.
Programming languages is concept-heavy early, then settles into smaller interpreter-style assignments.
Theoretical CS is lighter on programming but heavier on proof practice before exams.
Software engineering has team deliverables that benefit from longer gaps between class and work hours.
Information assurance includes hands-on security work and can spike around project deadlines.
Linear algebra stays manageable if you keep a steady weekly problem-set rhythm.
Statistics usually adds lower risk and pairs well with project-based CSE courses.
